Validate a user-supplied phenotype data frame

Source: R/simulate_longit_dataset.R
validate_pheno.Rd

Checks that pheno is a data.frame containing all columns required by roi_associations + a folder_id column. If pheno = NULL and roi_associations is empty, a minimal bookkeeping-only phenotype is built from data_structure.

Usage

validate_pheno(pheno, data_structure, roi_associations)

Arguments

pheno

A data.frame in long format, or NULL.

data_structure

Named list passed to build_minimal_pheno() when pheno = NULL.

roi_associations

Named list of numeric vectors as accepted by simulate_freesurfer_data().

Value

The validated (or freshly built) data.frame.
